title: Burgundy Velvet Ribbon, 2.5CM x 10Yards Velvet Ribbon, Christmas Ribbons for Christmas Tree Bows, Gift Wrapping, Bouquets Wedding Decoration, Crafts DIY (2 Rolls)

Gift Decor Ribbon: Soft, velvet in burgundy, 2.5 cm wide, 9 m per roll. Perfect for christmas bows, wedding ribbons, bouquet wraps, craft projects, party decor, and gift presentation

Burgundy Velvet Craft Ribbon: Rich, long-lasting velvet texture(2 rolls). great for wedding decor, gift wrapping, floral arrangements, holiday crafts, diy sewing, and boutique packaging. vibrant and durable
Ribbon Bows: Burgundy single-sided velvet ribbon ,perfect for bows, wreaths, wedding favors, gift wrapping, craft projects, and party decoration
Christmas Ribbon: Ideal for holiday decorations, bridal bouquets, gift wrapping, scrapbooking, and home decor. soft, vibrant, and easy to cut/use
description: This 10-yard single-sided burgundy velvet ribbon adds of crafts and decorations—perfect for gift wrapping, christmas tree bows, wedding decorations, floral arrangements, diy projects, hair accessories, or party decorations Set Includes: 2 burgundy of red ribbon Material: Crafted from soft velvet Size: 2.5cm wide, 10 yards per roll, length can be trimmed as required The rich burgundy hue lends a festive bouquets, table centrepieces, party favours and seasonal projects. Sufficient length for multiple bows, wreaths, gift wrapping and crafts. Single-sided construction facilitates cutting, tying and shaping, securely holding bows and decorations while remaining easy to handle, even for beginners Suitable for seasonal décor, event styling, ribbon crafts, scrapbooking and floral arrangements, this versatile burgundy velvet craft ribbon lends a professional festive weddings, celebrations and home decor
